base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of slime_blue_idle — a character from 1986 dragon quest. Blue Slime — iconic DQ mascot. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Blue Slime — iconic DQ mascot; weakest enemy; first encounter after leaving Tantegel Castle. Teardrop-body with smiling face
